title: Senior Financial Analyst - Fyers - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Fyers - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Fyers in Bhopal is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Fyers:
Fyers is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fyers!
